div.h1: Redirection via dup2(): The Order Matters

p.strong: 2>&1 copies WHERE fd 1 points NOW, not WHERE it WILL point.

ul.li: 2>&1 means: "make fd 2 point to the same thing fd 1 currently points to"
It does NOT create a permanent link — it's a one-time copy
Process redirections left-to-right to avoid this trap
